projects.title: Clarity - AI Daily Planner
projects.description: AI-powered daily planner ecosystem with collaborative features. Monorepo with Next.js web app featuring glassmorphism UI, Node.js backend with AI scheduling, and React Native mobile app.

projects.title: MintMorph - Smart Expense Tracker
projects.description: Modern AI-powered expense tracking application with intelligent transaction parsing, smart analytics, budget management, goal tracking, and a beautiful neumorphic design system.

projects.title: ML App Categorization
projects.description: Machine learning model for application categorization using app resources. Built a hybrid CNN + fastText approach combining image and text features for accurate classification at Samsung PRISM.

projects.title: Collision Avoidance System
projects.description: Computer vision model to detect and avoid collisions, simulated in Unity. Designed for automated vehicles that travel safely while efficiently managing resources.

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: Full-featured library management application with book tracking, user management, borrowing system, and search functionality built with Java and MySQL.

projects.title: AWS VPC & EC2 Infrastructure
projects.description: Cloud infrastructure setup with Virtual Private Cloud, EC2 instances, security groups, and networking configurations for scalable application deployment.

experiences.description: Promoted to Software Engineer after 2+ years as Associate Software Engineer. Working on enterprise software solutions at one of the world's leading heavy machinery manufacturers.
achievements: Promoted from Associate Software Engineer to Software Engineer
3+ years of progressive growth within the organization

experiences.description: Worked as an Associate Software Engineer building and maintaining software systems. Started as a College Intern in Jan 2023 and transitioned to a full-time role upon graduation.
achievements: Transitioned from College Intern to full-time Associate Software Engineer
Developed and maintained enterprise software applications

experiences.description: Developed an ML model for application categorization using application resources with pandas framework. Used CNN and fastText to train and test the model with a hybrid approach combining images and text.
achievements: Built hybrid CNN + fastText model for app categorization
Processed and analyzed application resources using Pandas
Combined image and text features for improved accuracy

experiences.description: Empowered young children in need of care and protection as a Transition Readiness Mentor. Helped volunteers work efficiently and resolved their concerns.

experiences.company: IT Association, PSG College of Technology
